title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
coreIdea: Find the length of the longest path from root to a leaf by recursively computing the depth of left and right subtrees and taking the larger, plus one for the current node.
recognitionCues: asks for height/depth of a tree
simplest possible recursive tree problem, often used as a warm-up
approach: Base case: if node is null, return 0. Otherwise, return 1 + max(maxDepth(left), maxDepth(right)).
